name: iBrowse SARL
notes: iBrowse builds and manages international private WANs for large multinational companies with decentralized sites and needs for high quality communications in multiple countries over a resilient, redundant MPLS network. Our solution includes sophisticated QoS and application-aware load balancing, as well as a single security policy across a single European network. We also provide value-added services such as guest WiFi access. iBrowse operates its own MPLS network connecting its core sites in data centres in the UK, France, Germany, Italy and Spain.
